name: test_bulk_adding_psd
description:
Test: PSDS can be bulk added for children in a session.
Steps:
1. Import two children into a session.
2. Record online consent for the two children.
3. Add PSDs in the session to all eligible children.
Verification:
- The PSDs appear for each child.
descriptionHtml:
Test: PSDS can be bulk added for children in a session.
Steps:

  1. Import two children into a session.
  2. Record online consent for the two children.
  3. Add PSDs in the session to all eligible children.
    Verification:
  • The PSDs appear for each child.

testStage.description:
Test: PSDS can be bulk added for children in a session.
Steps:
1. Import two children into a session.
2. Record online consent for the two children.
3. Add PSDs in the session to all eligible children.
Verification:
- The PSDs appear for each child.

parameters.name: args
parameters.value: (School(name='Swaffham Prior Church of England Primary School', urn='146357', site=None),)

parameters.value: (School(name='Swaffham Prior Church of England Primary School', urn='146357', site=None), <Programme.FLU: 'flu'>)
